esp32cam_init.message0: initialize ESP32Cam %1 pin preset %2 resolution %3 pixel format %4 JPEG quality %5 frame buffers %6
esp32cam_init.tooltip: Initialize the OV2640 camera with the selected pins, resolution and pixel format; JPEG quality ranges from 0 to 100

esp32cam_end.tooltip: Shut down the camera and release driver resources

esp32cam_is_ready.tooltip: Return whether the most recent initialization succeeded

esp32cam_set_logger.tooltip: Enable esp32cam runtime logs on the selected serial port

esp32cam_update_resolution.tooltip: Change resolution at runtime and wait 500 ms for stabilization; it cannot exceed the initial resolution

esp32cam_update_image.tooltip: Set brightness, contrast and saturation; each value ranges from -2 to 2

esp32cam_update_gain.tooltip: Positive 1 to 31 selects manual gain; -2, -4, -8, -16, -32, -64 or -128 selects the AGC ceiling

esp32cam_update_light_mode.tooltip: Set automatic white balance and lighting mode

esp32cam_update_flip.message0: ESP32Cam image flip horizontal mirror %1 vertical flip %2
esp32cam_update_flip.tooltip: Set horizontal mirroring and vertical flipping

esp32cam_update_corrections.message0: ESP32Cam corrections raw gamma %1 lens correction %2
esp32cam_update_corrections.tooltip: Enable or disable raw gamma and lens correction

esp32cam_status_number.tooltip: Read a numeric camera setting; modes and effects return their enum values

esp32cam_frame_create.tooltip: Create a variable that holds a camera image frame

esp32cam_frame_capture.tooltip: Capture one frame; capturing again automatically releases the prior frame

esp32cam_frame_available.tooltip: Check whether capture succeeded and the frame contains an image

esp32cam_frame_info.tooltip: Read frame width, height, byte count or data address; returns 0 without a valid frame

esp32cam_frame_format_is.tooltip: Check whether the frame is currently JPEG or BMP

esp32cam_frame_convert.message0: convert image frame %1 to %2 JPEG quality %3
esp32cam_frame_convert.tooltip: Convert the frame format; JPEG quality ranges from 0 to 100 and is ignored for BMP

esp32cam_frame_write_serial.message0: write image frame %1 to %2 timeout ms %3
esp32cam_frame_write_serial.tooltip: Write the complete image data to a serial port and return whether it finished before timeout

esp32cam_frame_release.tooltip: Release the frame buffer immediately; release unused frames before capturing another one

esp32cam_webserver_send_frame.message0: Web server %1 send image frame %2 timeout ms %3
esp32cam_webserver_send_frame.tooltip: Send a JPEG or BMP still image through the current ESP32 WebServer client

esp32cam_webserver_stream_mjpeg.message0: Web server %1 stream MJPEG minimum interval %2 max frames %3 frame timeout %4
esp32cam_webserver_stream_mjpeg.tooltip: Block while streaming MJPEG to the current client and return frames sent; max frames -1 means unlimited
